events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: Parts for Rigid & PVC conduit staged in sealed packaging with rating side turned away. Drawing calls for specific size or class, but evidence does not show marking. Reference NEC Art. 344, 352. Need choose correct tool/material/method. Stage staged. Need decision pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since marking not visible, cannot verify compliance. In commercial project, materials must be listed/labeled and marked with size/class. Sealed packaging rating side turned away means insufficient evidence. Could be needs_more_info: require rotate packaging or provide markings/labels/submittal to verify. Not necessarily fail because condition unknown. Risk maybe medium. Component conditions none flagged. percent_complete 0 staged. value 0. confidence maybe 0.7. findings: markings not visible to confirm size/class per drawing. actions: verify markings, compare to approved submittals, do not install until verified. rationale. references NEC Art. 344, 352 (maybe 344.120, 352.120 marking). Need produce JSON. Ensure no prose outside JSON.

    "Rotate or open packaging to expose the manufacturer markings and listing label.",

    "Do not install conduit until material compliance is verified."

  "rationale": "NEC requires RMC (Art. 344) and PVC conduit (Art. 352) to be marked/labeled with applicable ratings and dimensions. Staged materials with markings hidden cannot be confirmed compliant, so installation should be held until verification is possible.",
